title: AKC Knowledge Store
description: A list of distilled patterns produced by AKC's distill pipeline. See ADR-0003 and ADR-0004.

pattern.description: The distilled pattern text. Produced by Stage 2 of the two-stage distill pipeline.

distilled.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the pattern was distilled, or the literal string 'unknown' for legacy entries.

importance.description: Base importance score. Effective importance at read time is computed as base * 0.95^days_elapsed.

category.description: Optional classification tag used to partition the store at retrieval time.

source.description: Optional provenance reference (e.g. batch id, log file date, distillation run id).

last_accessed.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp updated when the pattern is injected into a prompt.
